commit.message:
fix: convert LV from broken submodule pointer to tracked files

- Removed 160000 submodule pointer for LV
- Added all files in LV/ directory to the main repository
- This ensures Render/Heroku can access the backend and frontend source code

chore: add Heroku deployment configuration

- Added root package.json for monorepo orchestration
- Added Procfile for Heroku process management
